channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kohl’s makes bold store change to lure back customers
item.description: Kohl’s rolls out a bold new in-store section across all locations to draw back shoppers amid ongoing challenges.

item.title: Social Security Trust Fund to Run Out of Money in 2032, a Year Sooner Than Expected
item.description: If Social Security’s trust funds were fully depleted, the result would be a roughly 20% across-the-board cut in benefits.
